emails.subject: WT-1 Spreadsheet
emails.body: WT-1 Spreadsheet Let me know if we're syncing-up. If we're off in June Dec, check what I have for the Red Rock Adm Ctrc (I know Dennis made some changes. I think I have the most current, but possibly not.) Thanks, Lindy

emails.subject: RE: WT-1 Spreadsheet
emails.body: RE: WT-1 Spreadsheet Thanks for the time yesterday, to sync the West Texas group unsubscribed volumes. I reviewed your spreadsheets and had 2 changes, they are in red text with a green shade. I have made the corresponding revisions to the CAS groups 13 17, as a group adjustment. The EBB will reflect these changes at or around the 2:30 pm Friday 11/09/01 update to the EBB. I have attached the rev. spreadsheet for your reference. The Red Rock Adm. Contracted volumes are right for the time period on your xls. Thanks PT 3-0667 To: Frazier, Perry
